arts.ttl: Man City boss Pep Guardiola gives next job update in subtle Gary Neville dig
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola has been involved in a number of high-profile rows with Salford co-owner Gary Neville during his time at Manchester City

arts.ttl: Man City vs Salford LIVE! FA Cup match stream, latest team news, lineups, TV, prediction today
arts.sum: Class of 92 owners will be hoping for a famous win over Pep Guardiola’s side

arts.ttl: Why Ryan Giggs will be in Salford City's dugout for Man City FA Cup tie
arts.sum: The former Manchester United winger will be in the away dugout for Saturday's fixture, aiding Salford manager Karl Robinson as the League Two outfit attempt to pull off a miraculous upset. Despite being part-owner of fourth-tier Salford, alongside his former 'Class of '92' colleagues, Giggs will be acting as one of the assistants for first-team manager Robinson's on Saturday - a position he has held since October 2024.

arts.ttl: FA Cup fourth round draw, TV channel and ball numbers as Man United and Man City discover opponents
arts.sum: Manchester United and Man City will both hope to be in the hat for the FA Cup fourth round draw

arts.ttl: Manchester City vs Salford City LIVE: FA Cup team news and line-ups from unique Manchester derby
arts.sum: The League Two side, who are owned by members of Manchester United’s ‘Class of ‘92’, face City in a Greater Manchester derby

arts.ttl: How to watch Man City vs Salford - TV channel, BBC iPlayer live stream, kick-off time
arts.sum: Premier League champions Manchester City welcome Class of 92-owned Salford City to the Etihad Stadium on Saturday (5.45pm) in their FA Cup third round match.

arts.ttl: Man City 'closing in' on Omar Marmoush transfer: When could Eintracht Frankfurt star join Pep Guardiola's side?
arts.sum: Manchester City are reportedly closing in on a deal to make Eintracht Frankfurt forward Omar Marmoush their second addition of the winter transfer window.

arts.ttl: Man City vs Salford City live early team news plus kick-off time and how to watch
arts.sum: Manchester City begin their latest FA Cup campaign at home to Salford of League Two - owned by a group of Manchester United legends.

arts.ttl: Man City agree £33.6m deal for Lens defender Khusanov
arts.sum: Manchester City agree £33.6m deal with Lens for Uzbekistan central defender Abdukodir Khusanov.

arts.ttl: Ryan Giggs speaks out on Salford City role and reveals whether he will stay in dugout
arts.sum: Manchester United legend Ryan Giggs returned to the dugout with Salford City last year - but the Welshman doesn't how if the arrangement will be a long-term one
